title: CanonicalDocument
description: A normalized, source-traceable document produced by the ingestion pipeline. Represents one stable logical unit that can later be re-chunked.

document_id.description: Stable identifier for this canonical document

content.description: Normalized text content of the canonical document

document_title.description: Optional local title for this canonical document or entry

source_checksum.description: Optional checksum of the raw source artifact used during ingestion

source_version.description: Optional version or printing identifier for the source

ingested_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this document was produced
